home.heroSub: Multidisciplinary visual production focused on brand identity, motion design, video production, and new media.
home.graphicDesignDesc: Using AI and new media tools, I create experimental and creative videos, music videos for artists, promotional and advertising videos for partners, and social media content for brands.
home.motionDesignDesc: I produce animation, kinetic design, video production, and cinematic storytelling.
home.aiCreationDesc: I design corporate identities, brand identities, editorial work, campaign and advertising visuals, and visual systems.
home.ctaDescription: Explore my selected works from design, motion design, video, and experimental production.

about.title: About
about.craftTitle: Multidisciplinary Production Transforming Ideas into Visual Worlds
about.bio: I'm Umut Gavaz, a multidisciplinary visual artist and designer based in Ankara. My creative journey began with graphic design education and expanded into AI video direction, new media art, visual arts, tattoo, mural, videography, video editing, animation, and AI-assisted production. I position myself not within a single discipline, but among the networks these fields create with each other. I create work that combines ideas, visual language, storytelling, and production process across different mediums, primarily in brand identity, print graphics, motion design, video production, and editing.
about.aboutPageIntro: I'm Umut Gavaz, a multidisciplinary visual artist and designer based in Ankara. My creative journey began with graphic design education and expanded into visual arts, tattoo, mural, videography, video editing, animation, and AI-assisted production. I create work that combines ideas, visual language, storytelling, and production process across different mediums, primarily in brand identity, print graphics, motion design, video production, and editing.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: For projects, collaboration, or just to say hello.

footer.copyright: Built by hand and curiosity. All rights reserved.

aboutSection.transformIdeas: This creative approach, utilizing multiple interdisciplinary fields simultaneously, is nourished by the pure imagination of childhood, life experiences, dreams, and images accumulated in the everyday world. Rather than simply producing visuals, it centers on creating meaning around ideas, building atmosphere, and storytelling.
aboutSection.journeyDescription: Whether the resulting work is commercial, artistic, or personal, the underlying approach remains the same: combining intuitive creation with a professional process to produce work that connects with the viewer, creates its own world, and leaves an impact.

projectDetail.projectDesc: A creative music video I produced for Alchemize, a track by Emel, one of Ankara's unique artists, with production by Nod4wa.
